text: Moving the warning in 24.5.6.1 to the place in the procedure where users would need to perform it when applicable (was https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=260253 applied silently or is https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=256725 a duplicate or related?)
